qualification.education_qualification: MBBS along with qualification in Radiology viz. MD (Radiology) or DNB (Radiology) or DMRD recognized by MCI/NMC/NBE or candidates having MBBS with Govt. approved completed Sonology course of PC & PNDT CBE II (SONOLOGIST)
qualification.details: MBBS along with qualification in Radiology viz. MD (Radiology) or DNB (Radiology) or DMRD recognized by MCI/NMC/NBE or candidates having MBBS with Govt. approved completed Sonology course of PC & PNDT CBE II (SONOLOGIST)

salary_details.details: ₹400/- per case + taxes (if any, applicable as per Govt. rules)

all_official_links.label: Download SAIL Radiologist/Sonologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL Radiologist/Sonologist posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Radiologist/Sonologist posts at SAIL is scheduled for 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Radiologist/Sonologist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a qualification in Radiology such as MD (Radiology), DNB (Radiology), or DMRD. Alternatively, an MBBS with a government-approved Sonology course is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Radiologist/Sonologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Radiologist/Sonologist position is 69 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Radiologist/Sonologist role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Radiologist/Sonologist position is ₹400/- per case, plus applicable taxes as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Radiologist/Sonologist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Radiologist/Sonologist position advertised by SAIL.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Required documents include a filled application form, educational certificates, mark sheets, experience certificates, registration certificates, PAN card, and Aadhar card, along with their self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Radiologist/Sonologist position is on a contract basis for one year.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SAIL office in Bokaro, Jharkhand, with the pincode 827001.
